name: Applesauce Peanut Butter Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add the granulated sugar, stirring continuously to ensure a smooth mixture.
3. Add the peanut butter and egg, stirring well to combine all ingredients.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients and applesauce to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for about 40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the squares to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before cutting and serving.
